'''rovangaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lobelike|lobelike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lobelike|lobelike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rovangaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovangithi|rovangithi]] || [[word:rovangiji|rovangiji]] || [[word:rovangishi|rovangishi]] || [[word:rovangiki|rovangiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovanguthuthu|rovanguthuthu]] || [[word:rovangujuju|rovangujuju]] || [[word:rovangushushu|rovangushushu]] || [[word:rovangukuku|rovangukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovanguthu|rovanguthu]] || [[word:rovanguju|rovanguju]] || [[word:rovangushu|rovangushu]] || [[word:rovanguku|rovanguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovangufthuf|rovangufthuf]] || [[word:rovangufjuf|rovangufjuf]] || [[word:rovangufshuf|rovangufshuf]] || [[word:rovangufkuf|rovangufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovangethe|rovangethe]] || [[word:rovangeje|rovangeje]] || [[word:rovangeshe|rovangeshe]] || [[word:rovangeke|rovangeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovangothotho|rovangothotho]] || [[word:rovangojojo|rovangojojo]] || [[word:rovangoshosho|rovangoshosho]] || [[word:rovangokoko|rovangokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovangotho|rovangotho]] || [[word:rovangojo|rovangojo]] || [[word:rovangosho|rovangosho]] || [[word:rovangoko|rovangoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovangofthof|rovangofthof]] || [[word:rovangofjof|rovangofjof]] || [[word:rovangofshof|rovangofshof]] || [[word:rovangofkof|rovangofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfthĂŻf|rovangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfjĂŻf|rovangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfshĂŻf|rovangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfkĂŻf|rovangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|rovangĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|rovangĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|rovangĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|rovangĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfthĂŻf|rovangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfjĂŻf|rovangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfshĂŻf|rovangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfkĂŻf|rovangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfthĂŻf|rovangĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfjĂŻf|rovangĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfshĂŻf|rovangĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:rovangĂŻfkĂŻf|rovangĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rovangĂŠthĂŠ|rovangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:rovangĂŠjĂŠ|rovangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:rovangĂŠshĂŠ|rovangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:rovangĂŠkĂŠ|rovangĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rovangathatha|rovangathatha]] || [[word:rovangajaja|rovangajaja]] || [[word:rovangashasha|rovangashasha]] || [[word:rovangakaka|rovangakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rovangatha|rovangatha]] || [[word:rovangaja|rovangaja]] || [[word:rovangasha|rovangasha]] || [[word:rovangaka|rovangaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rovangafthaf|rovangafthaf]] || [[word:rovangafjaf|rovangafjaf]] || [[word:rovangafshaf|rovangafshaf]] || [[word:rovangafkaf|rovangafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rovangasha|rovangasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rovangshĂ«sha|rovangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rovangrosha|rovangrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rovangmusha|rovangmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rovangyasha|rovangyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorovangnkshĂ«sha|gorovangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorovangnkrosha|gorovangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorovangnkmusha|gorovangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorovangnkyasha|gorovangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rovavangasha|rovavangasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rovavangshĂ«sha|rovavangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rovavangrosha|rovavangrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rovavangmusha|rovavangmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rovavangyasha|rovavangyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorovavangnkshĂ«sha|gorovavangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorovavangnkrosha|gorovavangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorovavangnkmusha|gorovavangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorovavangnkyasha|gorovavangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:revĂŠngasha|revĂŠngasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:revĂŠngshĂ«sha|revĂŠngshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:revĂŠngrosha|revĂŠngrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:revĂŠngmusha|revĂŠngmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:revĂŠngyasha|revĂŠngyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorevĂŠngnkshĂ«sha|gorevĂŠngnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorevĂŠngnkrosha|gorevĂŠngnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorevĂŠngnkmusha|gorevĂŠngnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorevĂŠngnkyasha|gorevĂŠngnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rovfangasha|rovfangasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rovfangshĂ«sha|rovfangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rovfangrosha|rovfangrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rovfangmusha|rovfangmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rovfangyasha|rovfangyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorovfangnkshĂ«sha|gorovfangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorovfangnkrosha|gorovfangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorovfangnkmusha|gorovfangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorovfangnkyasha|gorovfangnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
